title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions in Ghaziabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions:
Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
